node.statement: MAT-TRACE-001: For finite complex matrices E, rho, and O, the trace pairing is preserved between the embedded state rho -> E rho E^* and the ascending observable O -> E^* O E: trace((E rho E^*) O)=trace(rho (E^* O E)); if E^*E=I then trace(E rho E^*)=trace(rho). For any finite complex K and X, K^*(X^*X)K=(XK)^*(XK), giving the square-form positivity witness for Kraus/ascending congruence. Proven in Lean at Formalisation/LinearAlgebra/Trace.lean and checked by Julia/WolframScript.
